Liability and Accident Insurance

MENU

Students who will participate in the Erasmus + Traineeship mobility must take out a full health insurance, which includes liability insurance (which covers the damages they will cause in the workplace) and accident insurance (at least that covers the damages that the student suffers in the workplace).

PARTICIPATION OF STUDENTS WITHOUT LIABILITY AND ACCIDENT INSURANCE IS NOT APPROVED!
